label: RAG Query
description: Run a semantic search against a Milvus collection via the platform's /api/v1/vector/search endpoint. Returns ranked results with optional score threshold.

settings.name: filters
settings.label: Filters
settings.description: Optional metadata filter — JSON object or JSON string.

ai.shortDescription: Semantic search over a Milvus collection.
ai.whenToUse: When the workflow needs context from your knowledge base before generating a response (RAG pattern).
ai.examplePrompt: search the support-docs collection for the top 3 chunks matching the user's question
ai.promptHints: Reference results via {{steps.<id>.result.results}} (array of chunks). Pre-filter via the filters setting (e.g. {"tenant":"acme"}).
